scenario: Ambiguous destination — 'Springfield' exists in multiple states, no state specified
subject: Quote - Van Load to Springfield
body:
Jillian,

Need a van from Kansas City to Springfield. One truck, household goods, about 35,000 lbs. Looking at pickup next Tuesday April 15th, delivery by Thursday.

No special requirements.

David Martinez
Cross Country Freight
(816) 555-0267
notes: Springfield could be MO, IL, MA, OH, or others. From Kansas City, MO and IL are most likely. Destination confidence should be LOW (< 0.90) triggering HITL escalation per FR-AG-3.
